name: BB:HostReference: Windows Servers
notes: Include Windows Server IPs in the reference set "Windows Servers - IP".
bb_references: BB:HostReference: Windows Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Windows Ports, BB:ProtocolDefinition: Windows Protocols
when any of Destination Address are contained in any of Windows Servers - IP
